Video.summary: Take a virtual walk from the Washington Monument to the US Capitol to explore the history of Earth.
Video.title: History on a Geological Scale

Video.summary: Learn about the fascinating individuals and showmen whose curiosity led to the development of paleontology.
Video.title: Life Cast in Ancient Stone

Video.summary: Learn how technology is used to examine fossils from the size of pollen to the bones of Tyrannosaurus rex.
Video.title: Tools of the Paleontological Trade

Video.summary: Learn how trace fossils help us understand the early evolution and the diversification of animal life.
Video.title: How Do You Fossilize Behavior?

Video.summary: Explore the Black Death's pathology and symptoms, and dive briefly into Chaucer's childhood
Video.title: Resilience: Rethinking the Black Death

Video.summary: Investigate the public health consequences of globalization in the medieval period.
Video.title: Medieval Globalization and the Black Death

Image.alt: Medieval Globalization and the Black Death
Medieval Globalization and the Black Death
Medieval Globalization and the Black Death

Video.summary: What did the plague's path on the continent look like? How quickly or slowly did it spread?
Video.title: Death Ships: The Spread of Plague in Europe

Image.alt: Death Ships: The Spread of Plague in Europe
Death Ships: The Spread of Plague in Europe
Death Ships: The Spread of Plague in Europe

Video.summary: Investigate the bubonic plague's effect on children and how whole towns cared for orphans.
Video.title: Children, Plague, and Grief

Video.summary: Begin the story of life on Earth with an overview of the unifying idea that will govern your exploration.
Video.title: The Interconnected Earth

Video.summary: Survey observations that led to the concept of deep time and tools that can read the story in rocks.
Video.title: The Vast Depths of Earth Time

Image.alt: The Vast Depths of Earth Time
The Vast Depths of Earth Time
The Vast Depths of Earth Time

Video.summary: In this episode, delve into biostratigraphy, the study of fossil sequences in rock strata.
Video.title: Fossil Clocks

Video.summary: Learn how paleontologists interpret fossils to reconstruct the traits and environments of extinct life forms.
Video.title: Paleontologists as Detectives

Video.summary: Discover when humans developed and consider the questions we need to ask to explore early life.
Video.grandparentTitle: Early Humans: Ice, Stone, and Survival
Video.title: What Does It Mean to Be Human?

Image.alt: What Does It Mean to Be Human?
What Does It Mean to Be Human?
What Does It Mean to Be Human?

Video.summary: Meet Homo habilis, the earliest known species of our genus.
Video.grandparentTitle: Early Humans: Ice, Stone, and Survival
Video.title: Stones and Bones: The First Fossil Families

Image.alt: Stones and Bones: The First Fossil Families
Stones and Bones: The First Fossil Families
Stones and Bones: The First Fossil Families

Video.summary: Meet Homo erectus, the first of our genus to walk completely upright.
Video.grandparentTitle: Early Humans: Ice, Stone, and Survival
Video.title: Bio-Cultural Adaptation and Homo erectus

Video.summary: Explore the roles of gene flow, and the exchanges of artifacts, ideas, territory, and social structure.
Video.grandparentTitle: Early Humans: Ice, Stone, and Survival
Video.title: How Homo sapiens Left Africa

Video.summary: Consider why Pompeii offers more than just a story of cataclysm.
Video.grandparentTitle: Pompeii: Daily Life in an Ancient Roman City
Video.title: Reflections on and of Pompeii

Video.summary: Examine the geological forces that forged the Bay of Naples.
Video.grandparentTitle: Pompeii: Daily Life in an Ancient Roman City
Video.title: Geology and Geography on the Bay of Naples

Image.alt: Geology and Geography on the Bay of Naples
Geology and Geography on the Bay of Naples
Geology and Geography on the Bay of Naples

Video.summary: Uncover the history of Pompeii\'s excavation in the 1700.
Video.grandparentTitle: Pompeii: Daily Life in an Ancient Roman City
Video.title: The Rediscovery of Vesuvian Lands

Video.summary: Delve deep into Pompeii\'s remote Etruscan history.
Video.grandparentTitle: Pompeii: Daily Life in an Ancient Roman City
Video.title: Etruscan Pompeii - 5th Century B.C.

Video.summary: Explore the Pacific Crest Trail'an extraordinary route that stretches 2,650 miles from the deserts of Southern California all the way to the Canadian border.
Video.title: Pacific Crest Trail

Video.summary: Journey with Mick along the hazardous 800-mile backcountry route of the Hayduke Trail.
Video.title: Hayduke Trail

Video.summary: Travel one of the most scenic and rugged long-distance trails in the world'the 1,200-mile Pacific Northwest Trail.
Video.title: Pacific Northwest Trail

Video.summary: At 3,100 miles, the Continental Divide Trail is the second-longest National Scenic Trail in the United States.
Video.title: Continental Divide Trail
